name: PATTERSON UTI ENERGY INC
summary: Patterson-UTI Energy, Inc. is a Houston, Texas-based provider of drilling and completion services to oil and natural gas exploration and production companies in the United States and select international markets. The company operates three segments: drilling services (contract drilling, directional drilling), completion services (hydraulic fracturing, wireline, cementing, power solutions), and drilling products (drill bits, downhole tools) serving over 30 countries.

products.name: Contract Drilling Services
products.description: Land-based contract drilling in continental US, Colombia, and Ecuador for oil and natural gas E&P companies.

products.name: Directional Drilling Services
products.description: Comprehensive directional drilling and wellbore placement accuracy services across major US onshore basins.

products.name: Hydraulic Fracturing Services
products.description: Well completion hydraulic fracturing services in active US basins including Permian, Eagle Ford, and Marcellus Shale.

products.name: Wireline and Pumping Services
products.description: Wireline and pumping services as part of integrated well completion solutions.

products.name: Cementing Services
products.description: Cementing services offered as part of completion services business.

products.name: Power Solutions Natural Gas Fueling
products.description: Natural gas fueling business supporting completion operations.

products.name: Proppant Last Mile Logistics and Storage
products.description: Proppant logistics and storage services supporting completion operations.

products.name: Drill Bits and Downhole Tools
products.description: Manufactured and distributed drill bits and downhole tools for oil, gas, geothermal, and mining markets in 30+ countries.

products.name: Electrical Controls and Automation
products.description: Electrical controls and automation solutions for energy, marine, and mining industries in North America and select markets.
